title.questionText: What is the title of the grant application?

significance.questionText: What is the problem or challenge your project aims to solve?
Why is this problem significant and how does it impact human lives?
How is the problem related to the stated aims of the program you are submitting to?
What is the current state of research in the relevant fields related to the problem?
What has been done in recent years to solve the problem?
What is your hypothesis about the right path to solving the problem?
How is this solution transformational in comparison to what has been done before?
How could this solution improve human lives in the future?

aims.questionText: What are the aims you plan to complete to test your hypothesis?

innovation.questionText: What makes your project unique compared to what has been done before?
What state-of-the-art technologies are you planning to use?
How is the use of these technologies in your context innovative?
If you plan to develop new tools as part of the project, explain what makes your development different from what already exists in the field.
How will your new tools be significant as part of the project and for the field in general?

researchPlan.questionText: For each aim, please provide the following details:
What strategy do you plan to use to accomplish Aim #?
What are the tasks, sub-aims, or studies you plan to undertake as part of this aim?
What is the experimental design you plan to use in this task?
What methods will you use to collect data?
How will you analyze the data?
How will you interpret the results?
Does this task include randomized groups or interventions?
Describe your methods for analysis and sample size, and explain how they fit your plans for this task.
Does this task include the study of vertebrate animals or humans?
Please describe how you factor all relevant biological variables—especially the sex of the subjects/tested animals—into your study design.
Does this task include any procedures, situations, or materials that may be hazardous to personnel?
If so, please describe them and the measures and precautions you plan to exercise.
Does this task include the use of Human Embryonic Stem Cells (hESCs) not included in the NIH hESC Registry?
Please describe why the use of such hESCs is necessary.
Does this task include the use of Human Fetal Tissue (HFT)?
Why can't the research goals be accomplished by using an alternative to HFT?
What methods were used (e.g., literature review, preliminary data) to determine that alternatives could not be used?
What results from a literature review were used to provide justifications?
What are the plans for the treatment of HFT and the disposal of HFT when research is complete?
What is the planned written, voluntary, informed consent process for cell/tissue donation?

preliminaryResults.questionText: What preliminary studies have you already conducted related to this aim? What were the results?
How do these preliminary studies support the feasibility of your proposed research?

risksAndAlternativeApproaches.questionText: What are the benchmarks for success for this aim?
What potential problems do you anticipate that might occur in this aim?
What is your strategy for establishing the feasibility of the aim?
How do you plan to address the high-risk aspects of your project?
What alternative approaches do you plan to implement if the risks materialize?

clinicalTrials.questionText: Does your project involve clinical trials?
How do you plan to recruit subjects for your clinical trial?
What strategies will you use to retain subjects throughout the trial?
How will you ensure the inclusion of women, minorities, children, and other underrepresented groups, if relevant?

progressReport.questionText: Is this application a Renewal or Revision application?
What were the beginning and ending dates for the period covered since the last competitive review?
What were the specific aims of the previous project period?
What progress was made toward their achievement?
What changes do you plan to make in the aims of the project?
What new directions do you plan to explore?
Does the renewal application include changing the number or composition of applicants from the previous proposal?
If so, what is the reason and rationale for the change?
